response.summary: Accomplished Senior Product Manager with extensive experience driving end-to-end product delivery and strategic roadmaps from concept to launch. I possess deep technical fluency in GenAI and agentic frameworks, enabling the development of predictive AI-first tools that optimize complex ecosystems. A data-driven leader, I excel at managing senior stakeholders and accelerating hypothesis validation to enhance the customer experience.
